name: Live Room Stage
description: Live co-production room stage combining voice presence, shared transport, room participants, chat highlights, takes, and synchronized playback state.

room.description: Full co-production room with speaker stage, participants, shared transport, cue markers, and chat highlights

compact.description: Compact room card/stage for room browser previews

visual_brief: A live studio room, not a generic video call. The main stage shows current speaker or shared session state, participant presence, talk/mute state, latency, role badges, cue markers, and take queue. A shared transport strip shows everyone locked to the same playhead. Browser-card previews must show host, cue, status, participants, BPM, key, and latency as separated chips or aligned columns; never concatenate room metadata. Chat is present but visually subordinate to session state. The surface should feel like remote co-production software: calm, precise, and music-aware.

slots.stage: Primary room stage with speaker/session focus, talk state, and shared playback.
slots.participants: Tiles with avatars, roles, mic state, and edit cursor state.
slots.session-sync: Shared transport, latency, cue markers, and take queue.
slots.chat-preview: Compact chat/reaction stream with shared track links.

micro.speaker-change: stage border shifts to active speaker color in 160ms
micro.cue-complete: take queue item slides into completed state

ambient.voice-activity: participant ring pulses to voice level
ambient.shared-playhead: transport advances while room is playing

responsive.mobile: Stage first, participant strip horizontally scrolls, chat and take queue become tabs.
responsive.desktop: Stage and session sync dominate; chat remains a side rail. Room browser layouts can pair preview cards with a monitor sidecar for latency, armed takes, next cue, and master bus status.

layout_hints.session_first: Shared audio session state should visually outrank generic video chat.
layout_hints.presence: Participant state must show voice, edit, and sync status clearly.
layout_hints.metadata_spacing: BPM, key, and latency should render as individual chips with gap, separator, or aligned columns.
